# NITH Results

> An unofficial NIT Hamirpur student results portal for browsing semester results, SGPA, CGPA, branch-wise rankings and performance analytics.

## About

NITH Results (nithresults.xyz) is an unofficial result portal for students of the National Institute of Technology Hamirpur. It provides a faster, more user-friendly way to access examination results compared to the official portal.

## Pages

- [Home](https://nithresults.xyz/): Search and browse student results with filters for branch, batch, sort order. View SGPA, CGPA, and semester-wise performance charts.
- [About](https://nithresults.xyz/about): Information about the portal, its mission, key features, and available branches.
- [Contact](https://nithresults.xyz/contact): Contact information, social links, and frequently asked questions.
- [Privacy Policy](https://nithresults.xyz/privacy): How we collect, use, and protect user data.

## Features

- Instant result lookup by roll number or student name
- SGPA and CGPA calculation for all semesters
- Branch-wise filtering (CSE, ECE, EE, ME, CE, CH, AR, MA, PH, MS, DCS, DEC)
- Batch-wise filtering by graduation year
- Semester-wise performance line charts
- Dark mode support
- Mobile responsive design

## API

- `GET /api/random` — Returns 10 random sample students
- `POST /api/query?query=<term>` — Returns students matching the search term

## Branches Covered

- Computer Science Engineering (BCS)
- Electronics and Communication Engineering (BEC)
- Electrical Engineering (BEE)
- Mechanical Engineering (BME)
- Civil Engineering (BCE)
- Chemical Engineering (BCH)
- Architecture (BAR)
- Mathematics and Computing (BMA)
- Engineering Physics (BPH)
- Material Science Engineering (BMS)
- Dual Degree Computer Science (DCS)
- Dual Degree Electronics (DEC)

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Vite, Chart.js
- Backend: Python, FastAPI, MongoDB
